description:
Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder

Dyad is a free, local, open-source AI app builder
Full release notes: https://www.dyad.sh/docs/releases/1.1.0
What's Changed
- Enable sandbox script by default and bump mustardscript by @wwwillchen in #3464
- Feat: Adding a mini plan when creating new apps by @azizmejri1 in #3093
- Improve thinking: enable Claude adaptive thinking and configurable th… by @wwwillchen in #3466
- Show a better preview loading screen & error UX by @wwwillchen in #3465
- Consolidate back buttons into shared BackButton component and redesign by @azizmejri1 in #3438
- Bump to v1.1.0-beta.1 by @wwwillchen in #3467
- Refactor big IPC handlers by @wwwillchen in #3457
- Refine posthog telemetry for execute sandbox script by @wwwillchen in #3471
- Treat preview stderr deprecations and npm warns as warnings by @wwwillchen in #3473
- Remove ci3 from nightly runner cleanup by @wwwillchen in #3477
- Gate pnpm installs by package release age & guide towwards pnpm usage by @wwwillchen in #3468
- Fix preview AI action gating on app exit failure by @wwwillchen in #3479
- Show Node download for pnpm v11 requirement by @wwwillchen in #3478
- Tighten Neon auth proxy header guidance by @wwwillchen in #3474
- Transition animation results in flickering when switching apps by @wwwillchen in #3481
- Gate pnpm warning and use available pnpm by @wwwillchen in #3483
- Surface pnpm preview startup errors by @keppo-bot[bot] in #3482
- Fix generated pnpm workspace config by @wwwillchen in #3486
- Bump to v1.1.0 by @wwwillchen in #3507
- Increase session debug log tail by @wwwillchen in #3508
- Filter community templates in app blueprint dropdown by @wwwillchen in #3509
Full Changelog: v1.0.0...v1.1.0
